LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PATRICIA KALMAN'S NOTICE OF AND MOTION TO ENFORCE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SEC 998 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S OFFER WAS ACCEPTED BY DEFENDANT IN A SIGNED WRITING PRIOR TO ANY PURPORTED REVOCATION OF THE OFFER. ACCEPTANCE OF THE OFFER PRIOR TO REVOCATION RESULTS IN A BINDING AGREEMENT AND, PER CCP 998, JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. Notice Of And Motion To Enforce Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Sec 998;
Off Calendar Nov-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tom Feeney from MacMorris & Carbone, 510-267-7273, for Defendant and moving party
Maria DelaFosse, Plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per
Nikolaus Reed, from Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen, 415-398-5000, specially appearing for plaintiff

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT PATRICIA KALMAN'S Notice Of And Motion To Enforce Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To CCP Sec 998 is Granted. Plaintiff's offer was accepted by defendant in a signed writing prior to any purported revocation of the offer. Acceptance of the offer prior to revocation results in a binding agreement and, per CCP 998, judgment shall be entered. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Text Ruling

Nicholaus Reed, Esq., from Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen, 415-398-5000, for moving party Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen
Maria Della Fosse, Plaintiff in Pro Per
Thomas J. Feeney, Esq., Law Offices of MacMorris & Carbone, 510-267-7273, for defendant Patricia Kalman, as an observant only

Discussed and LAW OFFICE OF BRIAN L. LARSEN'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF MARIA DELAFOSSE IS GRANTED, the plaintiff did not oppose the motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
